title: schollera seubertiana
intro: Schollera seubertiana, also known as the "Thai bitters" or "Andaman bitter", is a plant species native to Thailand and Myanmar, belonging to the family Rutaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Schollera seubertiana include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve symptoms of fever and rheumatism, and support the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
